title: Cryptool goes live on mainnet with Groups, Raise and GDS
content_html:
Cryptool is on mainnet, with three modules open from day one: Groups, Raise and GDS.

Alongside the launch, MultiversX has publicly confirmed its support for Cryptool through a statement from the official MultiversX account on X. The endorsement adds real weight to the launch and signals deeper ecosystem support to come.

With the platform now live, this is the right moment to onboard your community through the referral programme. The full Cryptool marketing push starts today across every channel, with regular updates over the coming weeks.
author: Cryptool
